keyPoints: JSP is a Java-based web technology used for building dynamic web applications.
It uses the Java Servlet API and is typically used in conjunction with a servlet container like Tomcat.
JSPs are essentially Java programs that run on the server-side, generating HTML pages as output.
JSPs use the EL expression language (EL) to access and manipulate data.
JSPs can be used for templating, such as generating HTML pages with dynamic data.
JSPs can also be used for server-side validation and processing of user input.
